summary: Lead accepted SIM-006 after validating the writer REVIEW handoff and final QA ACCEPT handoff. Integration gates passed for frozen install, content-schema/content-runtime/content-tools tests, content validation, architecture guard, typecheck, lint, full tests, aggregate check, task validation, JSON parsing, duplicate thread checks, route evidence, and whitespace. SIM-006 remains ACCEPTED rather than CLOSED until the implementation PR enters main.

tests_run.result: Final QA ACCEPT handoff is valid.
All 15 workspace projects were already up to date; lockfile integrity passed.
Vitest passed 1 file / 2 tests for source DTO schema validation.
Vitest passed 1 file / 2 tests for runtime content pack parsing and ID-based indexing.

Vitest passed 1 file / 8 tests covering valid 30-node fixture, bad references, duplicate IDs, duplicate routes, unstable order, unmarked isolation, invalid schema, and deterministic repeated compile output.
Content validation passed for m1.abstract-graph-30 with nodes=30, edges=60, manifestHash=4a438525.
Architecture boundaries passed; self-test fixture produced 15 expected violations.
Recursive workspace typecheck passed, including content-schema, content-runtime, and content-tools.
ESLint completed with no reported violations.
architecture:check, sim:determinism, root Vitest 11 files / 45 tests, and web Vitest 1 file / 3 tests passed.
format:check, lint, typecheck, and architecture:check passed.
SIM-006 recorded writer spawn exit 0, QA spawn exit 0, send_input exit 0 with submission 019ef8d7-a98d-7c20-af9e-0a886bc5655a, and both child close records.
Active SIM-006 writer/QA thread IDs were present before closure and duplicateThreadIds was empty.
SIM-006 is ACCEPTED; prior M1 tasks SIM-001, SIM-002, SIM-003, and SIM-004 are CLOSED.
With SIM-006 ACCEPTED on this branch, dependency-ready draft task is SIM-005.

decisions: Accept SIM-006 because independent QA returned ACCEPT and lead integration gates passed.
Keep SIM-006 at ACCEPTED until this branch is merged into main; CLOSED requires actual main integration.
Do not start SIM-005 before SIM-006 implementation PR is integrated and main is reconciled.
Treat apps/content-tools CLI filesystem reads as allowed content-tool boundary behavior; packages/content-runtime and packages/content-schema remain free of filesystem access.
risks: Content-runtime is intentionally not wired into sim-core in SIM-006 because sim-core was outside the allowed paths; later integration should add contract tests at the sim-core boot boundary.
Compiler v0 covers only the synthetic M1 abstract graph fixture, not M2 geometry or production historical content.
requested_action: Create the SIM-006 implementation commit and PR, wait for checks, merge only after gates pass, then reconcile main and close SIM-006 in a separate integration-closure step.
